changes.text: Monitoring Matrix: Global observability and logic registry
AppGlobal Settings: Centralized configuration and branding
API Sanitization: Robust input validation for all critical routes
Operational Status normalization (Running -> Active)
Navigation hang and lifecycle management
Settings tabs and full configuration access
Global Table Center-Alignment for data density
Environment-based API configuration
Global Registry Overhaul: Soft-Delete implementation
Site & Rack Provisioning workflow expansion

Full Audit Logs integration
Global UI optimization and performance pass
Removed restrictive unique constraints on assets
DateTime handling for asset edits (SQLite compatibility)
Dual-mode metadata editor (Table & JSON modes)
Comprehensive Bulk Actions for Assets and Services
Decommissioned view filtering logic
Tabbed Settings interface with dynamic configuration
Network Fabric port display and persistence
Visual identity: Added System Grid Icon
